product: Lakebase snapshot storage is now billed ​
tagline: June 1, 2026 Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling.
what_it_does: June 1, 2026 Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling. Snapshot storage size is shown on the Backup & Restore page.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
